rationale: X surfaces several concrete, line-cited findings grounded in the diff (untested early-return branch in the new DP-metadata helper, a plausible unnecessary all_gather on non-MoE paths, and the intent behind the dropped cfg_parallel_size guard), which lands closer to the ground truth's test-coverage theme (yenuo26's reduce_scatter verification comment) than anything in Y.
